items.headline: Mauritius weather bulletin – 01 April 2026
items.summary: Weather news for Mauritius issued at 16h30 on Wednesday 01 April 2026.General situation:1. A heavy rain warning is in force in Mauritius valid till 19h00.2. The atmospheric conditions are moist and unstable over our region.Forecast for the next 24 hours:Moderate to temporarily heavy showers, accompanied by thunderstorms to the south and over part of the central plateau, will gradually dissipate in the evening.Thereafter, the sky will be partly cloudy to cloudy during the night, with showers to the north, the east and over the central plateau.The minimum temperature will be between 19 and 21 degrees Celsius over the central plateau and between 23 and 25 degrees Celsius along the coasts.Mainly fair tomorrow morning.Cloud developments are expected in the afternoon over the Southern part of the island and over the Central Plateau with localised showers. These showers will be sometimes of moderate intensity, accompanied with isolated thunderstorms.The maximum temperature will be between 26 and 29 degrees Celsius over the highgrounds and between 31 and 34 degrees Celsius over the coastal regions.Wind light and variable during the night, blowing from the Northern sector at about 15 km/h tomorrow.Sea moderate beyond the reefs with swells of the order of 2 metres.The public is advised to:1. remain in safe places and avoid open areas, hikings, sea ventures and sheltering under trees during thundery showers.2. avoid places prone to water accumulation.3. be very cautious on the roads due to reduced visibility resulting from heavy rains and fog patches.High tides :Tomorrow 01h07 and 13h18.Low tides :19h08 and tomorrow 07h34.Sunset :18h11.Sunrise (tomorrow) :06h17.Atmospheric pressure at 16h00:1012 hectopascals.

items.headline: Trump attends birthright citizenship hearing at Supreme Court in historic first
items.summary: In a historic first, Donald Trump became the first US sitting president to attend oral arguments at the Supreme Court on Wednesday as it weighed his bid to restrict birthright citizenship. During more than two hours of questioning, justices from across the ideological spectrum assessed the policy’s legality, indicating that the court may be poised to block a key aspect of Trump’s immigration agenda.

items.headline: Debunking claims Israeli Jews are 'stealing land' in Morocco

items.summary: L’histoire du 1ᵉʳ avril, bien que mondialement célébrée, ne repose sur aucune source unique mais plutôt sur un faisceau de théories culturelles et calendaires.
